shared_rule: helpers pull hidden seams in reality
the world briefly becomes miniature around the eater
every transformation creates one airborne companion
the discarded peel becomes the next scene's sky
color travels between scenes along one continuous strip
tina_image: the skateboarder and loose leaves float outside the car
the miniature houses rise around the giant car
lychee helpers form an airborne chain above Tina
Tina's duplicate selves drift toward separate skies
the pink parasail lifts while the car settles downward
the peeled roof becomes a horizon line
raul_image: football players hover in their frozen formation
mango armor components wait weightless around Raul
fruit-gummy spectators float above their seats
Meg and her grape familiar stay grounded while everything else rises
field markings lift into orange construction lines
the giant mango hangs over the bleachers like a second sun
transition_object: one peel ribbon crossing the cut
a stadium light becoming a tropical sun
a roof seam becoming a field line
a rainbow canopy becoming a scoreboard arc
a falling sneaker becoming a football
